raw_consumer_statement: This is in regards to my Citi Diamond Preferred CardXXXX. I have lost my card and it have a lot of unauthorized charges. I called and reported right away around XX/XX/year> but they were unable to locate my account and told me to wait till I received a code in the mail. I waited for two weeks and then call back again on XX/XX/year> when I didn't receive anything int he mail. I was told the same thing again that they are unable to verify my identity and I need to wait till I received a code via mail. I asked them if there is another way to get it faster, and their answer was NO. I waited again and finally got a letter in mail on XX/XX/XXXX. I called and reported my card lost then. Now they are not resolving my issue and its not fair with me to pay for something that I did not authorize.Total amount is around {$2000.00}.
